title: Hack Epidemic (Origin Protocol - REKT)
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by re-entrancy attack on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls re-entrancy-vulnerable functions after a flash loan in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS RE-ENTRANCY-VULNERABLE-FUNCTION AFTER FLASHLOAN IN SAME TX
summary: Origin Protocol was hacked using a flash loan followed by a re-entrancy attack, resulting in $8 million loss. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing re-entrancy calls after a flash loan.
